zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Adams於1583年1月21日出生在英國薩默塞特巴頓時，他的父親John Adams28歲，母親Agnes Stone27歲。他於1609年10月19日與Edith Squire在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1632年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布萊崔並於1646年住在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔。他於1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔被列為farmer/malster。他去世於1646年10月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔享年63歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可昆西漢考克 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Adams于1583年1月21日出生在英国薩默塞特巴頓时，他的父亲John Adams28岁，母亲Agnes Stone27岁。他于1609年10月19日与Edith Squire在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1632年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布萊崔并于1646年住在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔。他于1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔被列为farmer/malster。他去世于1646年10月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔享年63岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可昆西漢考克 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Adriano, Aldo, Amadeo, Amedeo, Antonio, Armando, Cristiano, Donato, Emilio, Erasmo, Eugenio, Gerado, Marco, Salvatore, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Adamo, an equivalent of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave in the memorials list

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Adams was born on 21 January 1583, in Barton, Somerset, England, his father, John Adams, was 28 and his mother, Agnes Stone, was 27. He married Edith Squire on 19 October 1609, in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Braintree, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1632 and lived in Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1646. In 1646, at the age of 63, his occupation is listed as farmer/malster in Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 6 October 1646, in Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63, and was buried in Hancock Cemetery, Quincy, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Adams est né le 21 janvier 1583, à Barton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Adams, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Stone, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Edith Squire le 19 octobre 1609, à Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il a immigré au Braintree, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1632 et a vécu à Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1646. En 1646, à l’âge de 63 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est farmer/malster à Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1646, à Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Hancock Cemetery, Quincy, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

Oktober 1609 in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Edith Squire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Oktober 1646 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Hancock Cemetery, Quincy, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Adams è nato il il 21 gennaio 1583 nel Barton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Adams, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Stone, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Edith Squire il 19 ottobre 1609, nel Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Immigrato nel Braintree, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1632 e vissuto a Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1646. Nel 1646, all'età di 63 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come farmer/malster nel Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 6 ottobre 1646, nel Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Hancock Cemetery, Quincy, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Adamsが1583年1月21日にイギリスソメルセトバートンで生まれた時，父John Adamsは28歳，母Agnes Stoneは27歳であった。1609年10月19日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン マクレルでEdith Squireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1632年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブレイントレに移住し，1646年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクブレイントレに住んでいた。1646年，63歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクブレイントレでの職業はfarmer/malsterと記録されている。彼は1646年10月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクブレイントレで63歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルククインシハンコック セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Adams(이)가 1583년 1월 21일 영국 서머세트 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Stone(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1609년 10월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 Edith Squire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1632년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브레이트리로 이민을 떠났고, 1646년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 브레이트리에서 살았다. 1646년, 63세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 브레이트리에서 farmer/malster이었다. 그는 1646년 10월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 브레이트리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 퀸시 핸콕 세멧리에 묻혔다.

ru.Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: бреинтри, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Adams родился 21 января 1583 г. в местности бартон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Adams было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Stone, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Squire 19 октября 1609 г. в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в бреинтри, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1632 году, а также жил в местности бреинтри, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1646 году. В 1646 году, в возрасте 63 лет,  он работал по профессии farmer/malster в местности бреинтри, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 6 октября 1646 г. в местности бреинтри, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ханкокк кеметири, куинси, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Adams nació el 21 de enero de 1583, en Barton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Adams, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Stone, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Edith Squire el 19 de octubre de 1609, en Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Inmigró a Braintree, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1632 y vivió en Braintree, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1646. En 1646, a la edad de 63 años, su ocupación registrada era farmer/malster en Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1646, en Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Hancock Cemetery, Quincy, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
